usage: git [--version] [--help] [-C <path>] [-c <name>=<value>] [--exec-path <path>]

Options:
  --version                 print the Git suite version
  --help                    print this message
  -C path                   run as if git was started in path
  -c name=value             pass a configuration parameter
  --exec-path path          path to core Git programs
  --work-tree path          set the path to the working tree
  --git-dir path            set the path to the repository
  --no-pager                do not pipe Git output into a pager
